description_long: This air conditioner features a rectangular, boxy form with a predominantly white and light gray exterior. The front face displays a central hexagonal emblem above a blue-labeled control panel, flanked by two vertical black vents. Below the grille, three round control knobs are visible, likely for adjusting temperature, fan speed, and mode. The sides are plain and smooth, with subtle panel lines and a few protruding cylindrical elements near the bottom. The rear side has a large, ribbed grille with a central circular exhaust vent and several mounting points. The overall design suggests a robust, utilitarian appliance suitable for urban environments.
description: A boxy, white air conditioner with a hexagonal emblem, vertical black vents, and a ribbed grille with control knobs on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hexagonal emblem, blue-labeled control panel, vertical black vents, ribbed grille, and three round control knobs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, smooth surface with subtle panel lines and two cylindrical protrusions near the bottom.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a large ribbed grille, a central circular exhaust vent, and several mounting points.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with a plain surface, panel lines, and two cylindrical protrusions near the bottom.
attribute_brand_logo: A hexagonal emblem is present on the upper front face, black in color, centrally placed above the control panel.
attribute_grille_pattern: The grille features horizontal slats with medium spacing, covering the lower front and rear for air intake and exhaust.
attribute_control_panel_location: The control panel is located on the upper front face, directly below the hexagonal emblem.
attribute_exhaust_vent_design: A single, large circular exhaust vent is centered on the rear, surrounded by a ribbed grille with multiple mounting points.
